description_long: This is a compact, modern sofa with a boxy silhouette and a low profile, upholstered in a textured fabric featuring a woven pattern of off-white and blue stripes. The seat consists of three distinct, thickly padded cushions, while the backrest is similarly segmented into three plush sections, providing ample comfort. The armrests are wide, padded, and integrated into the overall form, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the sofa's chunky, monolithic appearance. The upholstery displays a basket-weave texture with visible horizontal and vertical blue bands, giving it a casual, handcrafted look. No legs are visible, suggesting a floor-hugging or concealed base design. The overall aesthetic is cozy and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A low, boxy sofa with thick, segmented cushions and a woven off-white and blue striped upholstery. The wide, padded armrests and absence of visible legs give it a solid, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, three backrest sections, and wide, padded armrests with the woven blue and off-white pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions, with the woven pattern wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous woven upholstery and the sofa's solid, block-like back with blue stripes running horizontally and vertically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest and the arrangement of the seat and back cushions from a different angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three thick, attached seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and integrated into the sofa's structure.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest, with a straight, blocky profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears solid and continuous with the rest of the sofa, suggesting a concealed or floor-hugging design.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, and segmented into three padded sections, continuous across the width of the sofa and integrated with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Woven fabric with a basket-weave texture, featuring off-white as the base color and broad blue horizontal and vertical stripes.
